'''Republic Fleet Systems''' was a [[Starship/Legends|ship]]-manufacturing company founded during the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]].

==History==
The company was originally founded to create [[Republic Fleet Systems warship|warships]] meant to quell<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> [[Sith Empire (Pre-Republic)|Sith]]-backed<ref name="EGVV" /> uprisings in the distant areas of the Republic.<ref name="TCSWE" /> As time went on, the company began to branch out into other markets, producing colony and exploration vessels, passenger ships and [[Transport/Legends|transports]]. RFS lasted for 15,000 years, eventually being disbanded by the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Senate]] just prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], with all its assets absorbed by the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]].<ref name="EGVV" />

A major shipyard in the company orbited the world of [[Abhean/Legends|Abhean]]. The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] training vessel ''[[Chu'unthor]]'' was built here.<ref name="POTJSB" />
Other notable products included the [[Star Saber XC-01 starfighter]]<ref name="POTJSB" /> and the [[Aurek-class tactical strikefighter]].<ref name="KOTORCG" />

{{Company-stub}}
